decisions.what: Used getDefaultConfig from @rainbow-me/rainbowkit for wagmi setup
decisions.why: Specification explicitly requires getDefaultConfig with appName, projectId, and chains; it auto-includes MetaMask, WalletConnect, and Coinbase Wallet connectors via RainbowKit defaults.

decisions.what: Added `as const` to chains tuple in src/config/web3.ts
decisions.why: Preserves precise tuple typing for wagmi/RainbowKit which expects a readonly non-empty chain tuple.

decisions.what: Set ssr: false on the wagmi config
decisions.why: This is a Vite SPA (no SSR); explicit flag avoids hydration-related warnings from getDefaultConfig defaults.

decisions.what: Created QueryClient as a module-level singleton in Web3Provider.tsx
decisions.why: Specification requires the QueryClient to be created once at module scope so it isn't re-created on every render.

decisions.what: Configured darkTheme with accentColor #8b5cf6, accentColorForeground white, borderRadius 'medium'
decisions.why: Matches the app accent color from tailwind.config.ts and the explicit RainbowKit theme parameters in the specification.
Specification mandates the provider hierarchy StrictMode > Web3Provider > App so wagmi/RainbowKit context is available throughout the tree.
